title: AriaCast Audio Handshake (READY)
description: JSON text frame sent by the Receiver immediately after a /audio WebSocket upgrade.

type.description: Forward-compatibility alias. Accepted by Android Sender in place of status=='READY'.

sample_rate.description: Audio sample rate in Hz. Normally 48000.

frame_size.description: Expected binary frame size in bytes. Normally 3840.
